name: autorelease: pending
description: release-please tracking label; do not remove (auto-restored) or no release is cut.

name: autorelease: tagged
description: release-please: Release PR merged; its vX.Y.Z tag and GitHub Release were cut.

name: release: approved
description: Human approval gate for a Release PR; opens the release-gate check. Remove to un-approve.

name: sbom-vuln
description: sbom-monitor.yml: osv-scanner found a vulnerability in a shipped SBOM.

name: mise-outdated
description: mise-outdated.yml: a mise-pinned tool drifted from its latest release.
